Container.Overview:
spotDL (Neuvillette Edition) with a Web GUI. Download Spotify playlists, albums, artists and tracks with album art, synced lyrics and full metadata. Supports Spotify URLs and Exportify CSV exports (no Premium required for CSV).
Spotify API credentials and YouTube cookies are stored securely in appdata (not in your music share) so they are never exposed to other users on the network.
Container.Description: spotDL (Neuvillette Edition) with a Flask web interface. Supports downloading via Spotify URLs or Exportify CSV exports. Credentials and cookie files are stored in appdata — never in the shared music folder.

Config.Name: Web GUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the spotDL web interface. Access at http://[UnraidIP]:5000

Config.Name: Appdata / Config Path
Config.Description: Where spotDL-GUI stores its config file and cookie file. Keep this in appdata — do NOT point it at a shared folder or your credentials will be exposed.

Config.Name: Music Output Path
Config.Description: Host path where downloaded music will be saved. Must be writable.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file ownership (default 99 = nobody on Unraid).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file ownership (default 100 = users on Unraid).

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Internal port the web server listens on. Change only if you also change the Port mapping.
